description: A screenshot grabbed from a local TV news broadcast (WVLT 8, Knox County), carrying the station's own broadcast graphics rather than agency design. The blurred background shows a sunny outdoor cityscape with the golden 'Sunsphere' tower of Knoxville. Overlaid white broadcast text on the right reads 'Trade school enrollment +20%' and 'University enrollment +2.1%', presenting a stat comparison. Along the bottom is the station's blue lower-third chyron 'NEW DETAILS / TRADE SCHOOL ENROLLMENT ON THE RISE / KNOX COUNTY', the 'WVLT 8' logo with a clock reading 11:11 and temperature 78 degrees, and a sponsor ticker ('OPEN ARMS CARE... WE'RE HIRING WEDNESDAYS... actively hiring! Visit www.openarmscare.org...'). Although it contains stat text, this is a captured TV news frame, not an agency-designed meme/poster; the agency reposted it as supporting evidence for trades-enrollment growth. Target audience: supporters and public, used as third-party validation.
notable_text: Trade school enrollment +20%; University enrollment +2.1%; TRADE SCHOOL ENROLLMENT ON THE RISE
